text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After spending a day out together, Tamamo
Cross and I are headed back to the academy
when...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I'm gettin' a call... Sorry, could ya gimme a
minute?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're the manufacturer I ordered from!
...Huh, whaddya mean, "problem?!"

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
There's a problem with da product? And there's
no fixin' it?! Do ya at least have somethin'
similar?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
This is a real important present for my li'l brother!
Check it again for me, wouldja? Please!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Siiigh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...My li'l bro won a track-and-field contest, so I
wanted to give him this okonomiyaki-shaped
cushion he's been eyein' up.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But the guy just now said there's some kinda
trouble with their production line, so they're not
sellin' 'em anymore.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I already told the li'l squirt his cushion's on
the way... I gotta do somethin'!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Ah, there you are! Tamamo Cross! You forgot to
turn in your assignment!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya kiddin' me?! This timin' couldn't be any
worse... Grk—I'll be back later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross runs off with a crumpled
expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm desperately racking my brain for a way
to help her out, a phrase she recently used pops
into my head.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
When ya don't got it, make it! That's my fam's
golden rule!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's it! And I know just who to ask for help with
sewing—Super Creek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, so you'd like to make a cushion shaped like
okonomiyaki?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'd be delighted to lend a hand! ♪ I've been
wanting to show Tamtam my appreciation for all
her help at the farm.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Me too... I haven't sewn much before, but I'll help
any way I can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the three of us set about making the
okonomiyaki-shaped cushion together.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Why yes, it's the okonomiyaki-shaped cushion
that your little brother wanted!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Problem solved, right, Tama? I'm glad things
worked out.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You guys went outta your way to make this... for
us?
choice_data_list:
It might look slightly misshapen compared to
the real thing.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Gah, what are ya talkin' 'bout?! It's perfect!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You guys made this thing with love! That makes it
worth more than anythin' on the market!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Isn't that nice, Trainer? ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! That compassion of yours has gone 'n got
me right in the feels!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I've always been the big sibling who saves the
day, but you're not bad yourself!
choice_data_list:
You've always been there for me, so I wanted to
return the favor.
I hope the cushion looks extra delicious.

I wanted to help you as much as you've helped
me, Tamamo!

I wanted to help you as much as you've helped
me, Tamamo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I've always been the big sibling who saves the
day, but you're not bad yourself!
choice_data_list:
You've always been there for me, so I wanted to
return the favor.
I hope the cushion looks extra delicious.

I wanted to help you as much as you've helped
me, Tamamo!

I wanted to help you as much as you've helped
me, Tamamo!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: And so did I! ♪ You're always helping me out, Tamtam.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right then, next time's my turn! And I always
give back double when I'm repayin' a favor!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Really? Well, then I'll have to repay that favor,
too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa whoa whoa, hold on a sec! You don't have
to do that—otherwise there'll be no end to this!
choice_data_list: Why not just try to be there for each other?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Kind gestures bring about kind gestures... How
absolutely wonderful. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'd love for us to have a connection like that,
Tamtam.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That goes for me too. What do you think, Tama?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Guh! Don't give me the puppy dog eyes... How am
I s'pposed to say no now?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Okay, okay! You scratch my back 'n I'll scratch yours!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Geez, you guys are somethin' else!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, through this experience, Tamamo Cross
comes to develop an even deeper connection
with her friends.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yup, no matter how ya slice it, this is one
tasty-lookin' okonomiyaki!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I'm hungry.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Uh oh, a sweet little someone's got a rumbly
tummy! ♪
choice_data_list:
Well, we were sewing non-stop for quite a
while...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Haha! If you're hungry, I gotcha covered!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: As thanks for the cushion, I'll cook up some real okonomiyaki for ya!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I've sharpened up my skills since last time, so
you're in for one heck of a treat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross goes on to cook up plenty of
okonomiyaki for us all to enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon, ya don't need to get that attached!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: We really care about you, Tamtam! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You're a very good girl, but you do tend to try
and manage everything all by yourself...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
So we'd like you to come to us for help from time
to time. Okay?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Creek...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I just can't help wanting to spoil such a
cute, hardworking girl like you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I appreciate it, but I'd rather ya didn't treat
me like a kid, ya know?
choice_data_list:
She's not treating you like a kid. She's just
showing you how much she cares.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sh-she is, huh... Well, I don't see myself
gettin' used to Creek's pampering, but I guess it
doesn't feel half bad.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross laughs bashfully, and the sight
warms my heart.
